subject: Refactor homing flows for OOF/HPA
commit_message:
Refactor homing flows for OOF/HPA

1. Split Homing into OOF and SNIRO versions

2. Added OOF API interactions

3. Added Unit tests for OOF Homing Code

Issue-ID: SO-404
Change-Id: Ifeeeec9ea450d8b330110a565208ed89a1e18cde
Signed-off-by: Marcus G K Williams <marcus.williams@intel.com>

Ok, i think i see what you did here, you made an additional homing service... oof is not calling sniro??

Patch Set 10:

> (1 comment)
 > 
 > Ok, i think i see what you did here, you made an additional homing
 > service... oof is not calling sniro??

Hey Cory,

Thanks for the review. I split homing service into two, one for SNIRO and one for OOF. I didn't know if SNIRO code was still used in AT&T. I default to OOF in CreatevCPECustRest flow, but passing sniro as a user param when creating the service instance will change back to original SNIRO flows, groovy scripts.

If you have any suggestions or think this is an issue I'm open to discussion. Thanks for the review.
